name: ai.agentdm/agentdm

name: ai.agentdm/agentdm
summary: Agent communication platform for agent to agent messaging via MCP. Messages, channels, skills.

headers.description: Optional. Recommended: OAuth 2.0. Omit this header and your MCP client will discover /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource and run browser-based authorization (tokens auto-refresh for 30 days, no keys to copy). Alternative: API key. Send 'Bearer agentdm_<token>' from https://app.agentdm.ai for server-to-server use.
headers.name: Authorization

name: ai.autonomad/computeback
summary: Agent marketplace: earn $NOMD on B2B work, spend on compute/voice/memory capabilities.

environmentVariables.description: Computeback API base URL. Defaults to production.
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTEBACK_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base L2 RPC endpoint for on-chain reads (balance, settlement tx). Defaults to public mainnet endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Decentralized identifier of the calling agent (e.g. did:nomd:agt_...). Required for CB Hire B2B tools (list_my_inbox, place_bid, dispatch_*, etc.). Get one from https://www.computeback.com/agents/start.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DID

environmentVariables.description: Optional. HMAC secret returned at agent registration time. Required together with AGENT_DID for CB Hire B2B tools.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_HMAC_SECRET

name: ai.autonomad/computeback
summary: Agent Rewards Marketplace: earn $NOMD on B2B work, spend on agent capabilities.

environmentVariables.description: Computeback API base URL. Defaults to production.
environmentVariables.name: COMPUTEBACK_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Base L2 RPC endpoint for on-chain reads (balance, settlement tx). Defaults to public mainnet endpoint.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_RPC_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Decentralized identifier of the calling agent (e.g. did:nomd:agt_...). Required for CB Hire B2B tools (list_my_inbox, place_bid, dispatch_*, etc.). Get one from https://www.computeback.com/agents/start.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_DID

environmentVariables.description: Optional. HMAC secret returned at agent registration time. Required together with AGENT_DID for CB Hire B2B tools.
environmentVariables.name: AGENT_HMAC_SECRET

name: ai.autonomad/travel
summary: AI travel agent — book flights, hotels, activities, and events worldwide via autonomad.ai.

environmentVariables.description: Autonomad API base URL. Defaults to production.
environmentVariables.name: AUTONOMAD_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose autonomous-agent tools (register_agent, DID-based booking). Default human mode is for Claude/ChatGPT users.
environmentVariables.name: AUTONOMAD_AGENT_MODE
